chunks: Looking for an easy way to grow your money? We have the answer.

sections.title: Royal Celebration Promotion
chunks: To celebrate the auspicious occasion of the Birthday Ceremony of His Majesty Preah Bat Samdech Preah Boromneath Norodom Sihamoni, King of the Kingdom of Cambodia, PPCBank is pleased to launch the “Royal Celebration” promotion. Customers can enjoy a special interest rate of up to 5.14% p.a. when opening a USD Fixed Deposit account via PPCBank Mobile App or smartBiz.
Promotion Period:
May 1 – May 15, 2026
View Promotion Details

sections.title: Earn interest on the money you deposit
chunks: Earn interest on the money you deposit.

If you have savings that you don’t plan to use anytime soon, a fixed deposit account will allow your money to grow with a specific interest rate depending. The longer you commit your money to being in the account, the higher the interest rate will be.
Open a fixed deposit account at PPCBank today, it’s easy. Make your money work for you and let it grow.

sections.title: Your Money Is Safe and Secure
chunks: We want you to be able to easily save your money!

PPCBank's savings account makes putting money aside simple. This account will maintain your money for whatever you might need it for next. When you open a savings account, you won't have to worry about annual or maintenance fees. You'll also receive a free passbook and will be able to make free transfers within PPCBank accounts.

sections.title: Current Account Overview
chunks: You can apply for checkbook linked with your current account to settle payment without coming to the bank or carrying cashes.
Do you need an account for your daily expenses?
Then a current account is for you!
A current account is an easy way to purchase your daily goods and services. It is an easy, convenient, and flexible way to manage your money and you will receive a monthly statement.
When you open a current account, you won’t have to worry about annual or maintenance fees. You’ll also receive a free passbook and will be able to make free transfers within PPCBank accounts.

sections.title: What Can You Do With A Current Account?
chunks: Access your account with your debit card, E-banking or by visiting any PPCBank branch
Withdraw funds from your account given that the minimum ongoing balance is valid
Chequebook is only available with current account; with fee charge only USD 5 per chequebook

sections.title: Installment Deposit Account
chunks: When you open your installment deposit account, you will get a free passbook and have no annual or maintenance fees.
An installment deposit account is a longer-term saving.

An installment deposit account is a longer-term saving. It is where you put a set amount of money or installment into the account daily or monthly for a set period of time and let it grow. Once the period is over, you withdraw the principal and interest together.

sections.title: Junior Savings Account
chunks: Best savings account for children
Personal BankingDeposit Junior Savings Account
Give your child a headstart towards a financially savvy future.

The PPCBank Junior Savings Account is a new savings initiative that enables Junior users to engage with online banking services, but with limited functions. The Junior users are managed by their Parent user through Mobile App.

sections.title: Benefits
chunks: No initial deposit
Very competitive interest rates
Helps children manage their money and develop an early savings habit
Helps children experience banking services through PPCBank Mobile App

sections.title: Features
chunks: Parents monitor and control their child’s banking activities.
Parents can set spending limits and receive real-time notifications.
Parents can set an auto-deposit schedule for Junior.

sections.title: Requirements
chunks: Click here to learn how to create a PPCBank Junior Savings Account.

eligibility.document: Parent must be a PPCBank customer
Valid ID Card, Passport and/or other documents that indicate a relationship between the parent/guardian and the child.

conditions.value: Top-Up, Pay by QR, Receive by QR, Request Money from Parents
PPCBank Mobile App and other electronic channels

sections.title: Important information
chunks: Phone number must be new to create the account for Junior. Existing phone number already registered with PPCBank Mobile App is not allowed.
The Parent user is the only legal account owner, and has all rights to fully control and manage the Junior Savings Account.
Only one Junior Savings Account per Junior User ID can be used.
If the Junior opens their own account by e-KYC or visiting the branch, the linked Junior Savings Account will be auto-disconnected from their mobile banking app.

sections.title: VIP Savings Account
chunks: Get the exclusive attention and the care you need and deserve.

If you are a more affluent customer, the VIP Savings Account is for you. It’s an easy, convenient, and flexible way to manage your money while it grows. We’ll make sure you receive special care and VIP service so that you leave PPCBank happy and satisfied.

sections.title: Buddy Bank
chunks: Buddy Bank
Say Hello to Cambodia’s First Buddy-Friendly Account.
Cambodia’s first-ever shared savings account designed for families, friends, and teams to manage money together with full transparency and zero confusion.
Start your Buddy Bank nowSecure by PPCBank100% Consent-DrivenTransparent for EveryoneInvited and Approved Members Only

sections.title: What is Buddy Bank?
chunks: A Shared Account Made for Real Life.

Buddy Bank lets groups pool money into one secure savings account inside PPCBank Mobile. From family dinners to group trips, monthly budgeting, or community activities, Buddy Bank makes shared money simple, safe, and stress-free.
Secure, Consent-driven, Transparency
Buddy Master: Creates the account and manages member activities
Buddy Members: Join, contribute, and request money take-out
Every action is transparent. Every member stays in control.

sections.title: For Anyone Who Shares Money Together
chunks: For Anyone Who Shares Money Together.
Families – monthly budgeting, celebrations, groceries
Friend Groups – travel plans, reunions, events
Office Teams – surprise gifts, team bonding, shared lunches
Students – club events, group projects
Community & Charity Groups – pooled donations
If you’ve ever shared expenses… Buddy Bank makes it 10× easier.

sections.title: Key Features
chunks: One owner, everyone shares. The Buddy Master owns the account. Members can see all activity at any time.
Full transparency in every transaction. No secrets, no confusion — all deposits, withdrawals, and requests are visible to the whole group.
Collecting group money has never been easier. Buddy Masters can send a Money Collection Request. Members just tap to contribute.
Perfect for any group purpose. Family dinners, friend trips, office team events, charity groups, school committees — Buddy Bank fits every scenario.
Split bills like a pro. Members can send a pay-back request to the Buddy Master for shared expenses.
Join or leave anytime. No paperwork. No hassle. Consent-based joining and leaving with a single tap.

sections.title: Buddy Master vs Buddy Member
chunks: Clear roles. Clear responsibilities.
Action | Buddy Master | Buddy Member
Open Buddy Bank
Invite Members
Deposit Money
Approve Collection Requests
Approve Withdraw Requests
Make Transaction from Account
View Account & History
Close Account
Leave Buddy Bank

sections.title: Why Buddy Bank Is Safe
chunks: Engineered for trust, designed for groups.
Consent-Based Controls: Every action, like joining, contributing, or withdrawing, requires member approval.
Transparent Logs: Every activity is recorded and visible to all members.
Invited Members Only: Only invited members can join your buddy bank.
Powered by PPCBank Security: Built on our proven banking infrastructure to ensure safety at every step.

sections.title: How to Get Started
chunks: Open PPCBank Mobile App
Navigate to Buddy Bank
Create a group and invite members
Start managing shared money easily and securely

sections.title: Songkhoem Installment Overview
chunks: Fulfill your financial plans effectively, accessible in both Cambodia and Korea.
Personal BankingDeposit SongKhoem Installment
High-interest savings with flexible terms

Start your Songkhoem Installment with PPCBank today and achieve your financial goals with attractive interest rates based on your savings period. You can easily open a Songkhoem Installment Account in KHR or USD through the PPCBank Mobile App.

sections.title: Special Benefits
chunks: Customers with a Junior Savings Account and at least one transaction will receive an additional interest rate of 0.10%
Customers with a Demand Deposit Account holding a minimum balance of USD 100 will receive an additional interest rate of 0.10%
Customers who hold both a Junior Savings Account and a Demand Deposit Account will receive an additional combined interest rate of 0.20%

sections.title: Drive Your Dream Car Sooner with a PPCBank Auto Loan
chunks: Looking for a smarter way to finance your car?

Whether it’s brand new or gently used, PPCBank offers auto loans with low, competitive interest rates that help you get on the road faster. Enjoy a quick and easy approval process, flexible repayment options, and trusted support every step of the way. At PPCBank, we make car ownership simple, affordable, and stress-free.

sections.title: Home Loan Overview
chunks: From 6.99%/Year
Our loans offer a competitive interest rate and a fast approval process so that you will be able to enjoy your new home easily.
Make your goal of owning a home or a property easy.
Are you looking to buy a new home for your family or maybe as an investment?​
We can help finance it with our Home Loans. You can borrow up to 80% of the home value for up to a 25-year repayment term at a low and attractive interest rate.

sections.title: To Apply
chunks: You will need to have a steady salary or sufficient income

sections.title: Loan Against Deposit
chunks: PPCBank now offers a smart loan-against-deposit for those who need emergency cash. You can apply for a loan instantly on PPCBank Mobile App without losing any accrued interest. Loans can be approved for up to 95% of the deposit amount.

sections.title: Key Benefits
chunks: No fees
Convenient loan application
No penalties for early loan repayment
3% interest per annum on deposit amount when opening account at a branch, and 2% p.a when opening account via PPCBank Mobile App
Loan terms based on the maturity date of Fixed Deposit
Loan amount of up to 95% of the deposit amount

sections.title: How to get Loan Against Deposit?
chunks: Tap on “Login to My Account”
Tap on “LOAN AGAINT DEPOSIT”
Tap “GET LOAN NOW”
Tap “I AGREE”, to agree with Terms and Conditions
Fill out your credit reporting application form, then tap “CONFIRM”
Enter the loan amount, select repayment type, then tap “NEXT”
Confirm your information by tapping “YES”
Name your account, then “CONFIRM”
Enter your mobile login pass code or use biometric authentication to confirm your loan request

sections.title: Visa Credit Card Overview
chunks: Our Visa credit card is convenient because you can spend now and pay later.

PPCBank Visa Credit Card is an electronic card loaded with the latest technology. It makes transactions more flexible for your spending needs, enabling cash withdrawals worldwide from any ATM and payments via POS terminals.
You can access online payments easier and enjoy a wide range of benefits and discounts from our merchants and other promotions wherever Visa is accepted.

sections.title: Key Benefits
chunks: Welcome cash back up to 5%
Get cash back rewards on all purchases cross currency (Oversea POS purchase Transaction).
Receive free instant notifications for every transaction anywhere in the world
Tap and pay in seconds
Can be used domestically and internationally wherever Visa is accepted
Easy to manage on PPCBank mobile app, including card activation, card block, transaction management and more
Enjoy discount offers and promotions worldwide

sections.title: Card Security
chunks: With PPCBank it is easy to make sure your card is secure. Please keep your card in a secure place. If you realize or suspect your card has been lost or stolen, please call our customer service hotline at 0963 909 909 / 023 909 909 or reach out through our live chat feature on the PPCBank Website.
After receiving the card:
Please sign the signature panel on the back of the card
You can active your new card on PPCBank Mobile App or ATM Machine
Keep your card in a secure place, if issue occurs will response by cardholder
PIN Usage
Please memorize your PIN, do not write it down
Do not let anyone use your card and do not disclose your PIN to anyone
Please change your original PIN to one of your choices on PPCBank Mobile app or at any PPCBank ATM.
Make sure your PIN is protected from being viewed when using an ATM
Please do not share card information, including full card number, expiry date, and security code (CVV Code) to anyone

sections.title: Ready to have a PPCBank Visa Credit Card?
chunks: Visit any PPCBank branch with required documents
For more information contact 0963 909 909 / 023 909 909

sections.title: Visa Debit Card Overview
chunks: PPCBank Visa debit card is an electronic card loaded with the latest technology.
Offers greater ways to manage your account balance!

Our Visa Debit Card allows you to use your account balance to make transactions. It keeps your money safe, whether you purchase online or offline. You will have better control over your finances and never go over your available funds. You can make cash withdrawals from ATMs worldwide and receive numerous discounts from our corporate partners.
Additionally, our card is protected with an additional layer of security (3-D Secure) with an OTP to confirm your identity in order to prevent fraud and unauthorized card usage.

sections.title: Benefits
chunks: Get cash back rewards on all purchases cross currency (Oversea POS purchase Transaction).
Receive free instant notifications for every transaction anywhere in the world
Tap and pay in seconds
Can be used domestically and internationally wherever Visa is accepted
Easy to manage on PPCBank Mobile App, including card activation, card block, adjust purchase/withdrawal limits, transaction management and more
Enjoy discount offers and promotions worldwide

Fill in card application form

sections.title: What is CSS (Cambodian Shared Switch)?
chunks: CSS is a local card scheme, under the authority of the National Bank of Cambodia (NBC). CSS cardholders can make transactions at domestic ATMs and POS in KHR and/or USD for a minimum fee nationwide.

sections.title: WHY PPCBANK CSS CARD ?
chunks: Low fee charge & Nationwide acceptance
Free notifications for each transaction
Enjoy discounts from PPCBank partners
Up to $3,000 for cash withdrawals and fund transfers.

eligibility.document: Application must have a savings or current account with PPCBank

fees.name: Cash Withdrawal at other bank ATMs
fees.value: Depending on CSS member banks (max. KHR 1,800)
